creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
At least wlroots upstream CI (Alpine + Arch + FreeBSD) is waiting on us to update the package. See also https://repology.org/project/wayland-protocols/history

Updates are not a race (quoting bapt@) but being slow puts us at a disadvantage upstream. This is not specific to wlroots or Wayland but affects any project that tests FreeBSD on CI and uses system packages instead of bundled dependencies. For example, RPCS3 upstream often requires recent Vulkan-Headers.
